Lab schedule

Colby College is supportive of the religious practices of its students, faculty, and staff and is committed to ensuring that all students are able to observe their religious beliefs without academic penalty. If you observe a religious holiday that will impact your work in this course, please see me at the beginning of the term. We will then work to find a reasonable accommodation that will allow you to complete the academic work.

Week Date Lab Assignments
1 9/3 No lab  
2 9/10 Lab orientation, begin Population Growth Experiment, begin Decomposition Experiment Slides, Population Growth Experiment protocol, Decomposition Experiment methods
3 9/17 Environmental Gradients Experiment on the coast Gradient Experiment Handout
4 9/24 Analysis of Environmental Gradients Experiment Coast data, Analysis instructions
5 10/1 Population Growth Experiment analysis Population growth instructions, ParameterSheet, SuggestedIntroPapers
6 10/8 Bog lab  
7 10/15 No lab  
8 10/22 Bog lab analysis MorphOfCompetitionWorksheet, AnnotatedBib
9 10/29 Edge Effects experiment PapersForAnnotatedBib, Annotated Bib. example, Edge effects experimental methods, Enter data here
10 11/5 Edge Effects experiment analysis tree data, site data
11 11/12 Finish Decomposition Experiment, and Decomposition Experiment analysis part I DecompDataEntry
12 11/19 No lab  
13 11/26 Decomposition Experiment analysis part II Decomposition experiment presentation topics, Class decomposition data, Class parameter estimates
14 12/3 Decomposition Experiment presentation
